experiment_info.experiment_description: Baseline + on-the-fly data augmentation (random left-right flip, p=0.5). All other parameters identical to baseline.
experiment_info.research_question: Does data augmentation improve generalization for 3D medical image generation with limited training data (1251 volumes)?

dataset_info.preprocessing: Percentile clip (0.5-99.5%), crop foreground, pad to cubic, resize to 32^3, normalize to [-1,1]
